{{Quote|In the Kastolar sector, Senator Jollin Resbin (Sneeve) has been rallying support for the Military Creation Act. He has recruited the support of retired Podracing legend Boles Roor who appeared in a series of holographic endorsements for the Senator.|The HoloNet News, reporting on Jollin Resbin's campaigning|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Jollin Resbin''' was a [[Sneevel/Legends|Sneevel]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sneeve/Legends|Sneeve]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Resbin [[Militarists/Legends|supported]] the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]], a piece of legislation considered by the Senate that would create an [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|army]] for the Republic. Seven [[Standard day/Legends|days]] prior to the scheduled final vote on the act, Resbin managed to secure the endorsement of the retired Sneevel [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracer]] [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]].

==Biography==
[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] Jollin Resbin was a [[Sneevel/Legends|Sneevel]]<ref name="TCSWE" /> who represented his<ref name="HNN" /> [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]<ref name="AA">''[[Alien Anthology]]''</ref> of [[Sneeve/Legends|Sneeve]] and the [[Kastolar sector/Legends|Kastolar sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], when a variety of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and corporations began to secede from the Republic.<ref name="AotC">{{Film|II}}</ref> During this [[Time/Legends|time]], Resbin supported the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]], a piece of legislation in the Senate that would form an [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|army]] for the Republic if passed.<ref name="HNN" />

[[File:BolesRoor-AlienAnthology.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Jollin Resbin recruited Boles Roor (pictured) to campaign with him to support the Military Creation Act.]]
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|regional/1359_1.html|Campaigning Reports from the Mid Rim}} is set on the date 13:5:9, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> seven [[Standard day/Legends|days]] prior to the scheduled final vote on the Military Creation Act, Resbin managed to gain the support of retired [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracing]] champion and fellow Sneevel [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]] as a part of his pro-act campaign. Roor appeared in several [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] endorsement commercials for Resbin supporting the Military Creation Act, which aired in the Kastolar [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Roor even came out of retirement for the senator, scheduling himself to compete in a series of charity [[Podracing/Legends|podraces]] throughout the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] to spread support for the Military Creation Act. One of the races was the [[Basoor Challenge]], which was scheduled to take place the same day as the final vote. Resbin's campaigning was later reported on by an edition of [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]].<ref name="HNN" />

Ultimately, the Senate never voted on the Military Creation Act. Instead, a centralized Republic [[Army/Legends|army]] was formed by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Sheev Palpatine]] after the Senate granting him emergency powers to counter the threat of [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]] from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="AotC" />

==Personality and traits==
Jollin Resbin was a [[Militarists/Legends|Militarist]]—one who supported the Military Creation Act—and was willing to campaign in his home sector to gain support for the act. During the Separatist Crisis, he had enough influence to gain the support of the famous podracer Boles Roor.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jollin Resbin was first mentioned in "Campaigning Reports from the Mid Rim" an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 55|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #55]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[May 9]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN55 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6774521|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-09|time=4:55 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
